stem.en:
Mr. Y created the worksheet in Figure 1 to obtain the trial-calculation values, from the current state to after the measures are implemented, regarding the relationship between the number of calls received per time slot at a telephone reception center and the number of operators required per time slot. In cells I4 to I15, calculation formulas have been entered to determine the number of operators based on the number of calls received after the measures are implemented, derived from [Reception Situation].
Which value is displayed at a in Figure 1? Here, the number of operators is the number of staff required per time slot to receive calls.

[Reception Situation]
(1) The current number of calls received per time slot is the average over the past year.
(2) The number of calls received and the number of operators after the measures are implemented are trial-calculation values.
(3) The time taken to receive one order is an average of 8 minutes per order.

　　The shaded portions are not displayed.
Figure 1  Calls received and operators per time slot
